harness.working_tree: Produced with the capability-conductor sampling + n_choices diff UNCOMMITTED on branch feat/capability-conductor (base 12f202d0). Re-seal against the commit once landed.

evidence.summary: class-I invariant unit tests (tests/inference_session.rs: top_k_one_is_argmax_regardless_of_seed, min_p_one_keeps_only_argmax, min_p_zero_is_a_noop, rejects_min_p_out_of_range, repeat_penalty_one_is_a_noop, repeat_penalty_demotes_a_repeated_token, rejects_non_positive_repeat_penalty) + API-contract test (api::tests::min_p_and_repeat_penalty_are_typed_fields_not_unsupported); e2e per row: min_p=0.05 + repeat_penalty=1.3 accepted (HTTP 200, previously a 400 stub), out-of-range min_p=1.5 → typed HTTP 400.
